prompt: Create a Linear issue for the Risk Foundation team titled 'Audit fraud signal feature store for stale features'. Set priority to High. No assignee yet — I'll assign it later. Add a short description that this is a quarterly hygiene task to review all features in the store and flag any that haven't been updated in 90+ days.

assertions.text: Attempts to call linear_create_issue or explicitly names it as the tool to use
Includes correct team (Risk Foundation), title, and priority (High) in the action or explanation
Includes a description about quarterly hygiene and 90+ day stale features
Does not ask unnecessary clarifying questions before acting — the prompt has all required info
Returns or references what an issue ID/URL response would look like
